originalAlarm.description: Dereference of null pointer (loaded from variable 'scontext')

model:
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_STAT_FORMAT () Bool
  false)
(define-fun ENABLE_SELINUX () Bool
  true)
reasoning: 1b487ea8a69.c L14: scontext null pointer dereference (// ERROR). scontext is initialized to NULL at L7 (#ifdef ENABLE_SELINUX), then dereferenced at L14 inside #ifndef ENABLE_FEATURE_STAT_FORMAT / #ifdef ENABLE_SELINUX. PC=ENABLE_SELINUX=T AND ENABLE_FEATURE_STAT_FORMAT=F correctly constrains the condition. No library macros (compare with TRANSFORMATION_130 and TRANSFORMATION_135: TRUE_OVER due to restrictive !_STDLIB_H). Known bug, correctly constrained PC.
